title: Drawing a selection rectangle over road points
capture_instructions: The user is mid-drag in the 3D viewport. A dashed or solid selection rectangle is visible, drawn from an upper-left corner to a lower-right corner over a section of road points. The cursor is at the lower-right corner of the rectangle. Road points (grey/dark brown in Classification mode) are inside the rectangle area. The drag is not yet released.
ui_state: Reclassify Points active, Drag-Select mode, selection rectangle being drawn over road

annotations.label: Default drag = replace selection with rectangle contents
